title: Connect Ropes
hints: This is a classic greedy problem. Always connect the two shortest ropes first.
Use a min heap to efficiently get the two smallest ropes at each step.
At each step, pop the two smallest ropes, add their sum to the total cost, and push the sum back into the heap.
Continue until only one rope remains in the heap.
The greedy approach of always connecting the smallest ropes minimizes the total cost.
